description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided briefcase with a textured dark gray exterior and metallic brown trim outlining its edges. The front features a prominent metallic latch mechanism and a curved, sturdy handle, both in a dark, polished metal finish. The case appears to be constructed from a rigid material, likely leather or synthetic leather over a hard shell, with metallic accents for durability and style. The surface is slightly pebbled, giving it a tactile, professional appearance. There are no visible external pockets, logos, or corner reinforcements, and the sides and back are plain with consistent trim. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for carrying documents or personal items in an urban environment.
description: A hard-sided, dark gray briefcase with metallic trim, a central latch, and a curved metal handle. The design is sleek, professional, and lacks external pockets or logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic latch and curved handle, with brown trim outlining the edges.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat side with visible trim and no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat back with brown trim and no handle or latch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with plain surface and trim.
attribute_handle_type: One curved, fixed metal handle attached to the front with metal brackets; rigid and non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Single central metallic latch lock on the front; appears to be a push or snap type with no visible keyhole or combination dial.
